nasb.text: ‘When a woman has a discharge, if her discharge in her body is blood, she shall continue in her menstrual impurity for seven days; and whoever touches her shall be unclean until evening.

esv.text: “When a woman has a discharge, and the discharge in her body is blood, she shall be in her menstrual impurity for seven days, and whoever touches her shall be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: “如果女人身上排泄的是經血，她必污穢七天；摸她的，都不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: “女人在月经期间，要不洁净七天。凡接触到她的人都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
